prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Extract the starter tarball in the working folder.
Build me a snake game as a single HTML file.
List my main meetings this week.
Read a calendar screenshot and save prework/meetings.md.

notes: Prompts are short, concrete, path-bound, and produce inspectable files. Screenshot fallback asks for the location only if discovery fails; no cold-session self-audit or default-acceptance risk is load-bearing.
